summary: Iteration 10 testing completed - All new AI features working. 20/20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI features verified: voice input button, upload button, approvals tab, stats display. Fixed bug where suggested actions showed raw JSON instead of formatted buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Create Workflow: Generates proper workflow with nodes and edges from natural language description
Unified Approvals: Aggregates pending plans, workflows, and emails into single endpoint
Document Upload: Processes text/JSON documents with AI extraction of key facts, entities, insights
Voice Transcribe: Placeholder endpoint returns helpful message about STT integration needed
AI Stats: Returns sessions, totalPlans, completedPlans, knowledgeDocuments, agentLearnings, successRate
seed_data_creation: Test workflows and documents created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New endpoints tested: POST /api/ai/create-workflow (AI workflow generation), GET /api/ai/pending-approvals-unified (aggregated approvals), POST /api/ai/approve-item/{id} (approve/reject items), POST /api/ai/knowledge/upload (document upload with AI extraction), POST /api/ai/voice/transcribe (placeholder), GET /api/ai/stats (usage statistics). Frontend features: mic button for voice input, upload button with file picker, Approvals tab in sidebar, stats display at bottom of input area.

backend_workflow_structure: Workflow nodes have id, type, label - PASS
Workflow edges have source, target - PASS
backend_integration_flow: Full flow: stats -> create workflow -> upload doc -> check approvals -> stats - PASS
frontend: AI Command Center loads at /ai - PASS
Voice input button (mic icon) visible - PASS
Upload button visible and opens file picker - PASS

ai_create_workflow.details: Creates workflow from natural language with proper nodes and edges structure

unified_approvals.details: Aggregates pending plans, workflows, and emails from multiple sources

document_upload.details: Uploads documents and extracts key facts, entities, insights using AI

voice_transcribe.details: Returns helpful message indicating STT integration needed (OpenAI Whisper, Google Speech-to-Text)

ai_stats.details: Returns sessions, totalPlans, completedPlans, knowledgeDocuments, agentLearnings, successRate

frontend_voice_button.details: Mic icon button visible, toggles recording state

frontend_upload_button.details: Opens file upload area with drag-drop support, accepts .txt, .md, .json, .csv

frontend_approvals_tab.details: Shows pending approvals with approve/reject buttons

frontend_stats_display.details: Shows plans completed and docs count at bottom of input area

bug_fixed.issue: Suggested actions showing raw JSON instead of formatted buttons
bug_fixed.cause: Code checked for action?.text but AI returns action?.label

mocked_apis.voice_transcription: Voice transcription is MOCKED - placeholder requiring STT integration (OpenAI Whisper, Google Speech-to-Text)
mocked_apis.sendgrid: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - placeholder API key in backend/.env
mocked_apis.data_sources: Apollo.io, Clearbit, Crunchbase integrations are UI placeholders only
